basic_details.job_title: PMC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 60 Junior Engineer & Health Inspector Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Pune Municipal Corporation (PMC) Solid Waste Management Department has invited applications for the PMC Recruitment 2026 drive to fill 60 contract posts — 30 Junior Engineer and 30 Health Inspector vacancies. These are 11-month temporary, contract-based positions with consolidated monthly pay. Eligible candidates can submit applications offline from 29 June 2026 to 13 July 2026, up to 3:00 PM, at the PMC Main Building in Shivajinagar, Pune.

application_fee.details: The official PMC notice for this Junior Engineer and Health Inspector recruitment does not mention any application fee for any category of candidates. Applicants should rely only on the official notification for any fee-related updates if issued separately.

qualification.details: Eligibility for the PMC Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 and PMC Health Inspector Recruitment 2026 depends entirely on educational qualification, since the notice does not specify any age limit. Candidates applying for Junior Engineer need a technical degree, while Health Inspector applicants need HSC plus a specific diploma. Science graduates get preference for the Health Inspector post.

salary_details.details: Both posts under this PMC Bharti 2026 carry a fixed consolidated monthly pay rather than a pay matrix or grade pay structure, since these are contract appointments. The Junior Engineer post offers a higher consolidated salary compared to the Health Inspector post, reflecting the difference in qualification requirements.

selection_process: Selection for the PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector posts is a two-stage process: document screening followed by a personal interview. If the number of applications received exceeds the number of vacancies
PMC will shortlist candidates based on merit criteria before calling them for interview.

Application Screening: Applications are checked for completeness and attested qualification documents; incomplete applications are rejected outright. Merit-Based Shortlisting: If applications exceed available vacancies
PMC screens them on quality/merit norms and calls only the required number of candidates. Personal Interview: Shortlisted candidates are called for an interview
which they must attend entirely at their own expense (no travel allowance is provided). Final Selection: The Municipal Commissioner
PMC holds final authority over the selection process and decision. Contract Execution: Selected candidates must execute the service contract at their own cost before joining.
how_to_apply: Unlike many government recruitments, the PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector Recruitment 2026 application process is entirely offline — there is no apply-online portal mentioned in the official notice. Candidates must prepare a physical application and submit it in person at the designated PMC office before the deadline.
Address the application to the Deputy Commissioner, Solid Waste Management Department, Pune Municipal Corporation.
Clearly mention the post name applied for at the top of the application.
Fill in full name, complete address with pin code, date of birth, age, educational qualification, experience, landline/mobile number, and email ID.
Affix a recent passport-size photograph on the application.
Attach attested true copies of all required documents (listed below).
Submit the completed application during office hours (excluding public holidays) at: Swachh Survekshan War Room, PMC Main Building, 1st Floor, Shivajinagar, Pune – 411005.
Ensure submission is completed before 13 July 2026, 3:00 PM, as late applications will not be accepted.

Candidates searching for a "PMC Recruitment 2026 apply online" link should note that this particular recruitment does not have an online application facility. The PMC Solid Waste Management Department has specified only offline, physical submission of applications at its Shivajinagar office. Anyone offering an online apply link for this specific notice should be treated with caution, since it is not part of the official process described in the notification.

content_sections.heading: PMC Recruitment 2026 PDF Download Link
content_sections.text: Candidates looking for the PMC Recruitment 2026 PDF download can refer to the official notice issued by the PMC Solid Waste Management Department, Shivajinagar, Pune – 411005. The notice contains the complete vacancy details, eligibility, and application instructions for both the Junior Engineer and Health Inspector posts. Since no public download URL has been published in this notice, candidates are advised to obtain the official PDF directly from the PMC Solid Waste Management Department office or PMC's official communication channels. Download PMC Junior Engineer & Health Inspector Posts Recruitment 2026

content_sections.heading: Quick Summary: PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This section gives a one-look overview of the PMC Bharti 2026 for those short on time. It covers the organization, total vacancies, post names, pay, and the application deadline in a single table. Candidates searching for "PMC Recruitment 2026 vacancy details" can use this table as a quick reference before reading the full eligibility and application process below.

rows.information: Pune Municipal Corporation (PMC) – Solid Waste Management Department
11-month temporary, contract basis, consolidated monthly pay
Swachh Survekshan War Room, PMC Main Building, 1st Floor, Shivajinagar, Pune – 411005

content_sections.heading: PMC Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates tracking the PMC Bharti 2026 timeline only need to remember two dates: the opening and closing of the application window. PMC has not announced any written exam or interview date yet in this notice, as interview calls will depend on the number of applications received. Below is the confirmed date table for this PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector Recruitment 2026. Applications received after 13 July 2026, 3:00 PM will not be considered under any circumstances, as clearly stated in the official PMC notice.

content_sections.heading: PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector Vacancy 2026 Breakdown
content_sections.text: The PMC Solid Waste Management Department has notified a total of 60 vacancies split equally between two posts. Both posts have 30 vacancies each, distributed as 2 posts per zonal (Kshetriya) office. Here is the exact post-wise vacancy distribution from the official notification.

content_sections.heading: PMC Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria (Post-Wise Qualification)
content_sections.text: Eligibility for the PMC Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 and PMC Health Inspector Recruitment 2026 depends entirely on educational qualification, since the notice does not specify any age limit. Candidates applying for Junior Engineer need a technical degree, while Health Inspector applicants need HSC plus a specific diploma. Science graduates get preference for the Health Inspector post. Candidates applying for Junior Engineer must hold a B.Tech or B.E. degree in Environmental Engineering and Technology from a recognized university. This is the only qualification criterion mentioned for this post in the official notice. Candidates applying for the Health Inspector post must meet all of the following: passed HSC (12th standard) , passed the Sanitary Inspector course , and candidates holding a Science degree will be given preference . Beyond educational qualification, PMC has set two common conditions for both posts: the candidate must be a resident of Maharashtra State and must have working knowledge of the Marathi language . The official notice does not mention any specific age limit or age relaxation for either post.

content_sections.heading: PMC Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official PMC notice for this Junior Engineer and Health Inspector recruitment does not mention any application fee for any category of candidates. Applicants should rely only on the official notification for any fee-related updates if issued separately.

content_sections.heading: PMC Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for the PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector posts is a two-stage process: document screening followed by a personal interview. If the number of applications received exceeds the number of vacancies, PMC will shortlist candidates based on merit criteria before calling them for interview. Application Screening: Applications are checked for completeness and attested qualification documents; incomplete applications are rejected outright. Merit-Based Shortlisting: If applications exceed available vacancies, PMC screens them on quality/merit norms and calls only the required number of candidates. Personal Interview: Shortlisted candidates are called for an interview, which they must attend entirely at their own expense (no travel allowance is provided). Final Selection: The Municipal Commissioner, PMC holds final authority over the selection process and decision. Contract Execution: Selected candidates must execute the service contract at their own cost before joining.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for PMC Recruitment 2026 (Offline Application Process)
content_sections.text: Unlike many government recruitments, the PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector Recruitment 2026 application process is entirely offline — there is no apply-online portal mentioned in the official notice. Candidates must prepare a physical application and submit it in person at the designated PMC office before the deadline. Address the application to the Deputy Commissioner, Solid Waste Management Department, Pune Municipal Corporation . Clearly mention the post name applied for at the top of the application. Fill in full name, complete address with pin code, date of birth, age, educational qualification, experience, landline/mobile number, and email ID. Affix a recent passport-size photograph on the application. Attach attested true copies of all required documents (listed below). Submit the completed application during office hours (excluding public holidays) at: Swachh Survekshan War Room, PMC Main Building, 1st Floor, Shivajinagar, Pune – 411005 . Ensure submission is completed before 13 July 2026, 3:00 PM , as late applications will not be accepted.

content_sections.heading: PMC Recruitment 2026 Salary and Pay Details
content_sections.text: Both posts under this PMC Bharti 2026 carry a fixed consolidated monthly pay rather than a pay matrix or grade pay structure, since these are contract appointments. The Junior Engineer post offers a higher consolidated salary compared to the Health Inspector post, reflecting the difference in qualification requirements.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for PMC Recruitment 2026 Application
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for this PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector Recruitment 2026 must attach several supporting documents along with the application form, or the application will be rejected as incomplete. The list below is taken directly from the official notice. Original application addressed to the Deputy Commissioner, Solid Waste Management Department Attested true copies of educational qualification certificates Aadhar Card PAN Card Recent passport-size photograph Gazette notification copy (only if name has been changed) Self-declaration/affidavit confirming no pending criminal case

content_sections.heading: PMC Recruitment 2026 Apply Process (No Online Application Available)
content_sections.text: Candidates searching for a "PMC Recruitment 2026 apply online" link should note that this particular recruitment does not have an online application facility. The PMC Solid Waste Management Department has specified only offline, physical submission of applications at its Shivajinagar office. Anyone offering an online apply link for this specific notice should be treated with caution, since it is not part of the official process described in the notification.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid While Applying for PMC Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Many otherwise-eligible candidates lose their chance in government recruitments due to small, avoidable errors. Here are the most common mistakes applicants should watch out for in this PMC Bharti 2026. Submitting an incomplete application: Missing details like mobile number, email ID, or full address will lead to outright rejection. Skipping attested document copies: Self-attested or unattested certificate copies are not accepted; PMC specifically requires "प्रमाणित सत्यप्रती" (certified true copies). Forgetting the passport-size photo: The application must have a recent passport-size photo physically affixed, not just mentioned. Applying without checking Marathi language requirement: Since Marathi language knowledge is mandatory, candidates unfamiliar with it should reconsider before applying. Posting the application instead of hand-delivering: The notice specifies submission at the PMC office during working hours; confirm the accepted submission method before sending by post. Missing the 3:00 PM cutoff on the last date: Submitting late on 13 July 2026, even by a few minutes past 3:00 PM, will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: PMC Recruitment 2026 Important Information
content_sections.text: Before applying, candidates should be aware of a few important conditions tied to this PMC Bharti 2026 that affect their future job security. These posts are purely contractual, and PMC has clearly stated the limitations attached to them.

rows.information: Deputy Commissioner, Solid Waste Management Department, PMC
Swachh Survekshan War Room, PMC Main Building, 1st Floor, Shivajinagar, Pune – 411005
Selected candidates cannot claim any right to permanent/regular PMC employment, and are not entitled to benefits available to regular PMC staff

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for PMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector Recruitment 2026 is 13 July 2026, up to 3:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in PMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 60 total vacancies - 30 for Junior Engineer and 30 for Health Inspector — under the PMC Solid Waste Management Department.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification for PMC Junior Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech or B.E. degree in Environmental Engineering and Technology from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for PMC Health Inspector post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed HSC along with the Sanitary Inspector course; Science graduates get preference.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for PMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official PMC notice for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates apply online for PMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment does not have an online application process. Applications must be submitted physically at the PMC Main Building, Shivajinagar, Pune.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for PMC Junior Engineer and Health Inspector posts?
faq.answer: Junior Engineer gets a consolidated monthly pay of ₹50,000, and Health Inspector gets ₹40,000, both on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the tenure of these PMC contract posts?
faq.answer: Both posts are temporary and contract-based for a period of 11 months.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an age limit for PMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notice does not specify any age limit or age relaxation for either post.

faq.question: Q10. Will selected candidates get permanent employment in PMC?
faq.answer: No, selected candidates cannot claim any right to a permanent or regular post in PMC and are not eligible for benefits given to regular PMC employees.
